query:
SHOW COLUMNS FROM lead_activities;
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'leads' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('lostReason','source','sentiment');

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3txBsc7RzZ6puht.faa1fd724e39 --database Cy2Gc9yd7vWL7aTK7BRymU --execute SHOW COLUMNS FROM lead_activities;
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'leads' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('lostReason','source','sentiment');
